content:
# Sand Class System

**Summary**: A geochemical classification for terrigenous sandstones.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-alqubalee|Alqubalee, 2017]] applied the Sand Class System to classify lithofacies.

## Scientific Context

- [[2017-alqubalee|Alqubalee, 2017]] Used to differentiate sandstone types when petrography is complex.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2017-alqubalee|Alqubalee, 2017]] Plotting log(Fe2O3/K2O) vs log(SiO2/Al2O3).

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Well-A and Well-E were classified as sublitharenite, while other wells showed variable classifications. ([[2017-alqubalee|Alqubalee, 2017, p. 128]])
